title: galium pumilum var. helodes
intro: Galium pumilum var. helodes, also known as Helodes Galium, is a flowering plant species within the Rubiaceae family, commonly found in Australia and Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Galium pumilum var. helodes include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and support the immune system. Galium pumilum var. helodes can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, often in combination with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
